# Characters

All people in the world — player characters, NPCs, and villains.

## Schema
- type: character
- role: pc | npc | villain
- name, player (blank = NPC), race, class
- location: wiki-link to current location
- factions: list of wiki-links
- status: alive | dead | missing | unknown
- tags: freeform list

## Contents
(empty — world not yet created)
